data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement regarding the fee policy for declined offers, but the evidence does not provide any information about the handling of declined offers or the associated fee policy. The linked use case mentions the fee policy if an offer is declined after acceptance, but there is no concrete evidence or API reads that confirm this policy is implemented or functioning as required. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence regarding this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of fee policy implementation for declined offers after acceptance.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
